title: Golden Brown Dutch Onion Casserole
description: A briny, crumbly, and cozy Dutch dish featuring caramelized onions, this casserole is perfect for a cold winter night. It is sugar-free-friendly and can be served as a side dish or main course.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, caramelize the onions over medium heat for 20 minutes.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs, heavy cream, salt, black pepper, and dried thyme.
In a greased 9x13 inch slate-tile vessel, create a layer of caramelized onions.
Sprinkle a third of the gruyere cheese over the onions.
Pour a third of the egg mixture over the cheese.
Repeat the layers two more times, ending with a layer of cheese on top.
Dot the top of the casserole with butter.
Bake the casserole for 35 minutes, or until golden brown.
